item.endrem.fractured_eye.description: An eye born from the remnants of a shattered reality.
item.endrem.time_eye.description: An eye capable of severing itself from the flow of time.
item.endrem.mechanical_eye.description: An eye forged through mechanical ingenuity.
item.endrem.echo_eye.description: An eye that whispers with echoes from beyond the darkness.
item.endrem.honey_eye.description: An eye bestowed by the queen of an ancient hive.
item.endrem.under_eye.description: An eye recovered from the forgotten depths beneath the world.
